calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-16-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: P. Dias, CSR: Leticia A. Perez.
Petitioners: Jeorge Macia and Mercedes Jeannette Ayala, present in pro per, as Guardian ad Litem for Minors Karina Ivette Ayala and Cindy Janeth Ayala, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of Minors to: Karina Ivette MaMacias Ayala; and Cindy Janeth Macias Ayala.
Decree signed in open court.
